source_metadata.title: 2025/09/17 - MA
source_metadata.description:
Wednesday 17 September 2025 | Māori Affairs Committee 

Briefing on Treaty settlement legislation and Report of the Controller and Auditor-General, How public organisations are fulfilling Treaty settlements  

Hearing of evidence
Submitter list:

Ministry of Housing and Urban Development and Kāinga Ora 
 - Te Ariki Pihama, Deputy Chief Executive - Māori at Kainga Ora - Homes and Communities 
- Jessica Smith, Deputy Chief Executive Māori Crown Relations, Te Tūāpapa Kura Kāinga - Ministry of Housing and Urban Development 
 - Glenn Phillips, Deputy Chief Executive, Organisational Performance, Te Tūāpapa Kura Kāinga - Ministry of Housing and Urban Development
